summary: Allow Sunday to be recorded as the seventh regular workday without weakening full-attendance reminders.

notes: No database changes; the existing database guard already allows up to 7.0 regular workdays per weekly timesheet.
Separates the full-attendance reference from the hard regular-workday limit.
A complete Monday-to-Sunday period now allows up to 7.0 regular workdays.
Month-clipped periods remain limited to their active dates, and the per-day 1.0 workday limit remains unchanged.
Sunday and statutory-rest-day entries no longer show a false weekly-overage error when the total is within the hard limit.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.41.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.41.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.41.
